meaning: n.<美>斯卡珀农葡萄(美国南部产的黄绿色大粒葡萄)
examples: The wines and liqueurs and champagnes of new orleans were new and exhilarating to her acquainted with only homemade blackberry and scuppernong vintages and aunt pitty's "swoon" brandy;
The scuppernong arbor behind the house was purple and dark in the twilight.
